inputs.label: Base Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: The initial loan amount before adding the USDA upfront guarantee fee.

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial loan amount before adding the USDA upfront guarantee fee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: USDA peşin garanti ücreti eklenmeden önceki başlangıç kredi tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der anfängliche Darlehensbetrag vor Hinzufügen der USDA-Vorabgarantiegebühr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant initial du prêt avant ajout des frais de garantie USDA.

inputs.label: Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual nominal interest rate for the loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual nominal interest rate for the loan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredi için yıllık nominal faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt nominal annuel du prêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés nominal anual del préstamo.

inputs.label: Loan Term (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the loan in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the loan in years.

inputs.label: Upfront Guarantee Fee
inputs.businessContext: One-time USDA guarantee fee as a percentage of the base loan amount.

businessContext_i18n.en: One-time USDA guarantee fee as a percentage of the base loan amount.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel kredi tutarının yüzdesi olarak tek seferlik USDA garanti ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einmalige USDA-Garantiegebühr als Prozentsatz des Basisdarlehensbetrags.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de garantie USDA uniques en pourcentage du montant du prêt de base.

inputs.label: Annual Fee
inputs.businessContext: Ongoing USDA annual fee as a percentage of the base loan amount, paid monthly.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ongoing USDA annual fee as a percentage of the base loan amount, paid monthly.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel kredi tutarının yüzdesi olarak devam eden USDA yıllık ücreti, aylık ödenir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Laufende USDA-Jahresgebühr als Prozentsatz des Basisdarlehensbetrags, monatlich gezahlt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais annuels USDA courants en pourcentage du montant du prêt de base, payés mensuellement.
Montant annuel de la taxe foncière.

formulas.monthlyPI: totalLoanAmount * monthlyInterestRate * (1 + monthlyInterestRate) ** numberOfPayments / ((1 + monthlyInterestRate) ** numberOfPayments - 1)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
